hallucinations.description: Several citations reference non-existent or fabricated papers with future dates (2025) and invalid arXiv IDs, including Boufalis et al. (2025) arXiv:2511.12601 and Huang et al. (2025) arXiv:2506.08270.
hallucinations.evidence: References section: 'Boufalis, O., ... (2025). Symmetry-Aware Graph Metanetwork Autoencoders... arXiv:2511.12601.' and 'Huang, Z., ... (2025). SWAT-NN... arXiv:2506.08270.'

hallucinations.description: The paper describes a canonicalization module for scaling symmetries (Section 3.4) using activation magnitudes and differentiable normalization, but this component is completely absent from the implementation.
hallucinations.evidence: Paper 3.4 details canonicalization with mu_i and Lambda rescaling; code in symae.py (GNNEncoder, SymAE class) and run_experiment.py (train_symae) has no canonicalization, scaling handling, or activation calibration.

overall_assessment: Hallucinations found: nonexistent citations and hallucinated methodology (canonicalization module described but not implemented). Experimental results and core GNN approach are consistent with code execution.
